title: Brent crude falls to $96.97 (-0.86%) — ends 3-session winning streak
snippet: Brent crude oil fell to $96.97 USD/barrel on June 4, 2026, down 0.86% from the previous day, ending a 3-session winning streak. Futures fell below $97 on Thursday.
tag_reason: 6/4 유가 데이터는 신규 시장 정보. 전일 $96.89(src-1567)에서 소폭 상승 후 3연속 상승 마감
